Description:
  funURL - A Functional URL Swiss Army Knife

Usage:
  funurl [command] [options]

Options:
  -s, --silent    Suppress the startup banner
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  parse <url>     Parse and extract components from a URL
  modify <url>    Modify components of a URL
  encode <input>  URL-encode a string
  decode <input>  URL-decode a string
  dedupe <urls>   Remove duplicate URLs based on structure

Description:
  URL-decode a string

Usage:
  funurl decode <input> [options]

Arguments:
  <input>  String to decode

Options:
  -c, --query     Decode as query component (handles + as spaces)
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  -s, --silent    Suppress the startup banner

  <urls>  URLs to deduplicate

  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  -s, --silent    Suppress the startup banner

Description:
  Modify components of a URL

Usage:
  funurl modify <url> [options]

Arguments:
  <url>  URL to modify

Options:
  -c, --protocol <protocol>  Change protocol/scheme
  -p, --path <path>          Update path
  -q, --query <query>        Change query string
  -f, --fragment <fragment>  Update fragment
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  -s, --silent               Suppress the startup banner

Description:
  Parse and extract components from a URL

Usage:
  funurl parse <url> [options]

Arguments:
  <url>  URL to parse

Options:
  -c, --protocol   Extract protocol/scheme
  -s, --subdomain  Extract subdomain
  -t, --tld        Extract top-level domain
  -n, --hostname   Extract hostname
  -p, --path       Extract path
  -q, --query      Extract query parameters
  -f, --fragment   Extract fragment
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information
  -s, --silent     Suppress the startup banner
